name: michael-zhou-qa-portfolio
description: QA Test Automation Portfolio - Cypress, Selenium, Postman/Newman
author: Michael Zhou <zhou_juxi@hotmail.com>

*.py: bash -c 'F="$@"; if [ -x venv/bin/ruff ]; then R="venv/bin/ruff"; elif command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then R=ruff; else R="python3 -m ruff"; fi; $R check $F && $R format --check $F' --
microservice-testing-platform/**/*.js: bash -c 'cd microservice-testing-platform && if [ -x node_modules/.bin/eslint ]; then npx --no-install eslint --no-warn-ignored "$@"; fi' --
playwright-demo/**/*.{js,ts}: bash -c 'cd playwright-demo && if [ -x node_modules/.bin/eslint ]; then npx --no-install eslint --no-warn-ignored "$@"; fi' --
